A

ack(String) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.CommandTimeoutWatcher
Removes a command from the watch list because its ACK has been received.
add(AutomationRule) - Static method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.AutomationRuleMessage
Creates an ADD message carrying the full rule to register.
ADD - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.AutomationRuleMessage.Operation
Add a new automation rule.
addAutomationRule(AutomationRule) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Validates, stores, and publishes a new automation rule.
addAutomationRule(AutomationRule) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.ICoordinator
Validates, stores, and publishes a new automation rule.
addAutomationRule(AutomationRule) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.gateway.ApiGateway
Submits a new automation rule to the system.
addRule(AutomationRule) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.AutomationHub
Adds a new automation rule.
addRule(AutomationRule) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.IAutomationHub
Adds a new automation rule.
ApiGateway - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.gateway
The API Gateway is the single point of entry for all user-facing requests.
ApiGateway(List<String>) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.gateway.ApiGateway
Constructs the API Gateway.
AUTOMATION - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.TopicType
Published by the leader coordinator when an automation rule is added, removed, or toggled.
AutomationHub - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation
Concrete implementation of IAutomationHub.
AutomationHub(String, IMessageBus) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.AutomationHub

Represents a user-defined automation rule.

Payload for messages published to the TopicType.AUTOMATION topic.
AutomationRuleMessage.Operation - Enum Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.models
The type of automation rule operation carried by this message.

channelInactive(ChannelHandlerContext) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageBusServerHandler
Called when the remote component closes its connection or disappears.
channelRead0(ChannelHandlerContext, String) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.CoordinatorServerHandler
Called by Netty when a fully framed, decoded JSON string arrives.
channelRead0(ChannelHandlerContext, String) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageBusServerHandler
Called by Netty when a fully framed, decoded JSON string arrives.
Command - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.models
Represents a command issued to an edge device.
Command(String, DeviceAction) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.Command
Constructs a new Command with no additional parameters.
Command(String, DeviceAction, Map<String, String>) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.Command
Constructs a new Command with additional action parameters.
COMMAND - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.TopicType
Published by the coordinator (or Automation Hub) to instruct an edge device to perform an action.
CommandStatus - Enum Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums
Represents the result status of a command sent to an edge device.
CommandTimeoutWatcher - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator
Watches in-flight commands and marks them as failed if no ACK is received within the configured timeout window.
CommandTimeoutWatcher(ICoordinator, long, long) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.CommandTimeoutWatcher
Constructs the CommandTimeoutWatcher.

Section
Coordinator - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator

Coordinator(String, List<String>, MessageBusClientRunner) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Constructs a Coordinator node.
COORDINATOR - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.ElectionMessage.Type
Broadcast by the winner — all nodes should update their leader reference.
CoordinatorServerHandler - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator
Netty inbound handler for the Coordinator node's TCP server.
CoordinatorServerHandler(ICoordinator) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.CoordinatorServerHandler
Constructs a handler for one accepted channel.
CoordinatorServerRunner - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator
Boots and runs the Netty TCP server on a Coordinator node.
CoordinatorServerRunner(ICoordinator, int) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.CoordinatorServerRunner
Constructs the coordinator server runner.
createTopic(TopicType) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.IMessageBus
Creates a new topic on the message bus if it does not already exist.

D

deregisterChannel(String) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageBus
Removes a disconnected component's channel and all its topic subscriptions.
deserialize(String) - Static method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.util.MessageSerializer
Deserializes a JSON string back into a Message<?> with the correct concrete payload type.
Device - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.models
Represents a registered smart home edge device.
Device(String, String, DeviceType, List<DeviceAction>) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.Device
Constructs a new Device with the given registration details.
DEVICE_NOT_FOUND - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.CommandStatus
The target device could not be found or is not registered.
DeviceAction - Enum Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums
Represents the set of actions that can be issued to edge devices via a Command.
DeviceEvent - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.models
Represents an event emitted by an input-type edge device (e.g., motion sensor, doorbell, light sensor).
DeviceEvent(String, DeviceType, String) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.DeviceEvent
Constructs a new DeviceEvent with no additional metadata.
DeviceEvent(String, DeviceType, String, Map<String, String>) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.DeviceEvent
Constructs a new DeviceEvent with additional metadata.
deviceId - Variable in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.InputDevice
The unique ID of this device.
DeviceType - Enum Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums
Represents the type of a smart home edge device.
Doorbell - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.device
Represents a smart doorbell edge device.
Doorbell(String, String) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.Doorbell
Constructs a Doorbell.
DOORBELL - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.DeviceType
A doorbell that publishes ring events.

edu.yu.cs.com3810.util - package edu.yu.cs.com3810.util
 
ELECTION - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.TopicType
Used by coordinator nodes to exchange Bully Algorithm election messages (ELECTION, OK, COORDINATOR).
ELECTION - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.ElectionMessage.Type
This node is starting an election — sent to all higher-ID nodes.
ElectionMessage - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.models
Payload for messages published to the TopicType.ELECTION topic.
ElectionMessage(ElectionMessage.Type, String) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.ElectionMessage
Constructs an ElectionMessage.
ElectionMessage.Type - Enum Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.models
The type of election protocol message.
enqueue(DeviceEvent) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.EventListenerRunner
Places a DeviceEvent on the queue for processing.
enqueueInbound(Message<?>) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageBus
Places an inbound message onto the queue for the dispatcher to process.
EVENT - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.TopicType
Published by input devices (motion sensors, doorbells, light sensors) when they detect an event.
EVENT_DOORBELL_RING - Static variable in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.Doorbell
Constant event type string published when the doorbell is pressed.
EVENT_LIGHT_LEVEL_CHANGED - Static variable in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.LightSensor
Constant event type string published when the light level changes.
EVENT_MOTION_DETECTED - Static variable in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.MotionSensor
Constant event type string published when motion is detected.
EventListenerRunner - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation
Drains the Automation Hub's inbound device event queue and evaluates rules in a dedicated thread, keeping rule evaluation off the Netty I/O threads.
EventListenerRunner(IAutomationHub) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.EventListenerRunner
Constructs the EventListenerRunner.
exceptionCaught(ChannelHandlerContext, Throwable) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.CoordinatorServerHandler
Called on uncaught exception.
exceptionCaught(ChannelHandlerContext, Throwable) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageBusServerHandler
Called on uncaught pipeline exception.
executeCommand(Command) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.IEdgeDevice
Executes an incoming command received from the COMMAND topic.
executeCommand(Command) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.InputDevice
Input devices do not execute commands.
executeCommand(Command) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.SmartLight
Executes an incoming command received from the COMMAND topic.
executeCommand(Command) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.SmartSpeaker
Executes an incoming command received from the COMMAND topic.

F

FAILURE - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.CommandStatus
The command failed during execution on the device.

G

getAction() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.Command
Returns the action this command instructs the device to perform.
getAllDevices() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Returns all devices currently registered with the system.
getAllDevices() - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.ICoordinator
Returns all devices currently registered with the system.
getAllDevices() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.gateway.ApiGateway
Retrieves all devices registered with the Smart Home system.
getAllRules() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.AutomationHub
Returns all automation rules currently managed by this hub, including both active and inactive rules.
getAllRules() - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.IAutomationHub
Returns all automation rules currently managed by this hub, including both active and inactive rules.
getAutomationRules() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.gateway.ApiGateway
Retrieves all automation rules currently active in the system.
getAvailableActions() - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.IEdgeDevice
Returns the list of actions this device is capable of performing.
getAvailableActions() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.InputDevice
Input devices do not accept commands, so this returns an empty list.
getAvailableActions() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.SmartLight
Returns the list of actions this device is capable of performing.
getAvailableActions() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.SmartSpeaker
Returns the list of actions this device is capable of performing.
getAvailableActions() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.Device
Returns the list of actions available on this device.
getAvailableActions() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.RegistrationPayload
 
getCommandId() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.Command
Returns the unique ID of this command.

Returns the network address of the current leader coordinator.
getCurrentLeaderId() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Returns the node ID of the currently elected leader coordinator.
getCurrentLeaderId() - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.ICoordinator
Returns the node ID of the currently elected leader coordinator.
getCurrentTrack() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.SmartSpeaker

Returns a specific registered device by its ID.

H

handleAutomationMessage(AutomationRuleMessage) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Called by the AUTOMATION topic subscriber when an AutomationRuleMessage arrives from the leader.
handleAutomationMessage(AutomationRuleMessage) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.ICoordinator
Called by the AUTOMATION topic subscriber when an AutomationRuleMessage arrives from the leader.
handleCommand(Command) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Processes a user-initiated command request.
handleCommand(Command) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.ICoordinator
Processes a user-initiated command request.
handleCommandResult(String, CommandStatus) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Handles the result of a previously issued command received from the message bus.
handleCommandResult(String, CommandStatus) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.ICoordinator
Handles the result of a previously issued command received from the message bus.
handleDeviceHeartbeat(String) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Processes a heartbeat message received from an edge device.
handleDeviceHeartbeat(String) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.ICoordinator
Processes a heartbeat message received from an edge device.
handleEvent(DeviceEvent) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.AutomationHub
Processes an incoming event from an input device.
handleEvent(DeviceEvent) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.IAutomationHub
Processes an incoming event from an input device.
handleNodeHeartbeat(String) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Processes a heartbeat received from another coordinator node.
handleNodeHeartbeat(String) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.ICoordinator
Processes a heartbeat received from another coordinator node.
HEARTBEAT - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.TopicType
Published periodically by edge devices and coordinators to signal they are still alive.
HeartbeatMonitor - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.heartbeats
Monitors heartbeat liveness for both edge devices and peer coordinator nodes, and triggers the appropriate recovery action when a heartbeat is missed.
HeartbeatMonitor(ICoordinator, long, long, long) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.heartbeats.HeartbeatMonitor
Constructs the HeartbeatMonitor.
HeartbeatSender - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.heartbeats
Periodically emits heartbeat messages to the TopicType.HEARTBEAT topic on the Message Bus.
HeartbeatSender(String, IMessageBus, long) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.heartbeats.HeartbeatSender
Constructs a HeartbeatSender.

I

IAutomationHub - Interface in edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation
Interface for the Smart Home Automation Hub.
ICoordinator - Interface in edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator
Interface for the Smart Home Coordinator node.
IEdgeDevice - Interface in edu.yu.cs.com3810.device
Interface shared by all Smart Home edge devices.
IMessageBus - Interface in edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus
Interface for the Smart Home Message Bus (Connection Manager).
InputDevice - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.device
Base class for input-type edge devices (motion sensors, light sensors, doorbells).
InputDevice(String, String) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.InputDevice
Constructs an InputDevice.
INVALID_ACTION - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.CommandStatus
The command was rejected because it is not valid for this device type.
isActive() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.AutomationRule
 
isActive() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.AutomationRuleMessage
Returns the target active state for a TOGGLE operation.
isLeader() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Returns whether this coordinator instance is the current leader.
isLeader() - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.ICoordinator
Returns whether this coordinator instance is the current leader.
isLeaderFound() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.gateway.LeaderPollerRunner
Returns true once the leader has been successfully discovered.
isOn() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.SmartLight
Returns the current on/off state of this light.
isOnline() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.Device
Returns whether this device is currently considered online.
isPlaying() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.SmartSpeaker
Returns whether the speaker is currently playing.

L

LeaderElectionRunner - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator
Runs the Bully Algorithm leader election protocol in a dedicated thread.
LeaderElectionRunner(ICoordinator, String, List<String>, MessageBusClientRunner, long) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.LeaderElectionRunner
Constructs a LeaderElectionRunner.
LeaderPollerRunner - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.gateway
Polls the coordinator cluster to discover the current leader, running in a dedicated thread so the ApiGateway main thread is not blocked during startup or after a failover event.
LeaderPollerRunner(ApiGateway, List<String>, long) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.gateway.LeaderPollerRunner
Constructs a LeaderPollerRunner.
LIGHT - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.DeviceType
A smart light that can be turned on/off.
LIGHT_OFF - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.DeviceAction
Turn a light off.
LIGHT_ON - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.DeviceAction
Turn a light on.
LIGHT_SENSOR - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.DeviceType
A light sensor that publishes ambient light level events.
LightSensor - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.device
Represents an ambient light sensor edge device.
LightSensor(String, String) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.LightSensor
Constructs a LightSensor.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageBusMain
Starts the Message Bus process.
Message<T> - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.models
A generic envelope for all messages transmitted over the Message Bus.
Message(TopicType, String, T) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.Message
Constructs a new Message.
messageBus - Variable in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.InputDevice
The message bus used to publish events and heartbeats.
MessageBus - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus
The Message Bus — a standalone process that routes messages between all Smart Home components over persistent Netty TCP connections.
MessageBus() - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageBus
Initialises the bus with empty registries and pre-creates all required topics.
MessageBusClientRunner - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.communication
Establishes and maintains a Netty TCP client connection from any system component (coordinator node, edge device, automation hub) to the Message Bus server.
MessageBusClientRunner(String, int) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.communication.MessageBusClientRunner
Constructs a client runner.
MessageBusMain - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus
Entry point for the standalone Message Bus process.
MessageBusMain() - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageBusMain
 
MessageBusServerHandler - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus
Netty inbound channel handler for the Message Bus server.
MessageBusServerHandler(MessageBus) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageBusServerHandler
Constructs a handler for one accepted channel.
MessageBusServerRunner - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus
Boots and runs the Netty TCP server for the Smart Home Message Bus.
MessageBusServerRunner(MessageBus, int) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageBusServerRunner
Constructs the server runner.
MessageDispatcherRunner - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus
The dispatcher thread for the Message Bus process.
MessageDispatcherRunner(MessageBus) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageDispatcherRunner
Constructs the dispatcher.
MessageSerializer - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.util
Utility class for serializing and deserializing Message objects to and from JSON strings for transmission over Netty TCP channels.

Metadata key used to carry the lux reading in the published event.
MOTION_SENSOR - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.DeviceType
A motion sensor that publishes motion-detected events.

Represents a motion sensor edge device.

name - Variable in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.InputDevice
The human-readable name of this device.

O

OK - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.ElectionMessage.Type
Acknowledgement — sent back to a lower-ID node that sent ELECTION.
onLightLevelChanged(int) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.LightSensor
Called by the device firmware when a new ambient light reading is taken.
onMotionDetected() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.MotionSensor
Called by the device firmware when physical motion is detected.
onRing() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.Doorbell
Called by the device firmware when the doorbell button is pressed.

P

PENDING - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.CommandStatus
The device acknowledged the command but has not yet completed it.
Protocol flow - Search tag in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.LeaderElectionRunner

publish(Message<?>, String) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageBus
Fans a message out to all channels currently subscribed to the message's topic.
publish(Message<T>) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.IMessageBus
Publishes a message to its designated topic.
publishEvent(String, Map<String, String>) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.InputDevice
Constructs and publishes a DeviceEvent to the EVENT topic.

R

receiveCoordinator(String) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Called by the ELECTION topic subscriber when a COORDINATOR broadcast arrives.
receiveCoordinator(String) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.ICoordinator
Called by the ELECTION topic subscriber when a COORDINATOR broadcast arrives.
receiveElection(String) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Called by the ELECTION topic subscriber when an ELECTION message arrives from a lower-priority peer node.
receiveElection(String) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.ICoordinator
Called by the ELECTION topic subscriber when an ELECTION message arrives from a lower-priority peer node.
receiveOk(String) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Called by the ELECTION topic subscriber when an OK message arrives targeted at this node.
receiveOk(String) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.ICoordinator
Called by the ELECTION topic subscriber when an OK message arrives targeted at this node.
receiveOk(String) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.LeaderElectionRunner
Called by ICoordinator.receiveOk(String) when an OK message arrives on the ELECTION topic targeted at this node.
recordDeviceHeartbeat(String) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.heartbeats.HeartbeatMonitor
Records a heartbeat received from an edge device.
recordNodeHeartbeat(String) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.heartbeats.HeartbeatMonitor
Records a heartbeat received from a coordinator peer node.
refreshLeader() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.gateway.ApiGateway
Polls the coordinator cluster to refresh the current leader address.
register(String) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.IMessageBus
Registers a component or node with the message bus.
REGISTER - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.TopicType
Used by edge devices to register themselves with the coordinator on startup.
registerChannel(String, Channel) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageBus
Registers a newly connected component's channel.
registerDevice(Device) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Handles a device registration event received from the REGISTER topic.
registerDevice(Device) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.ICoordinator
Handles a device registration event received from the REGISTER topic.
registerFrame(String) - Static method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.util.MessageSerializer
Builds a REGISTER control frame JSON string.
RegistrationPayload - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.models
The payload published by an edge device to the TopicType.REGISTER topic on startup.
RegistrationPayload(String, String, DeviceType, List<DeviceAction>) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.RegistrationPayload
Constructs a RegistrationPayload.
remove(String) - Static method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.AutomationRuleMessage
Creates a REMOVE message targeting a rule by ID.
REMOVE - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.AutomationRuleMessage.Operation
Remove an existing automation rule by ID.
removeAutomationRule(String) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Removes an existing automation rule and notifies all subscribers.
removeAutomationRule(String) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.ICoordinator
Removes an existing automation rule and notifies all subscribers.
removeAutomationRule(String) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.gateway.ApiGateway
Removes an existing automation rule.
removeRule(String) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.AutomationHub
Removes an existing automation rule by its ID.
removeRule(String) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.IAutomationHub
Removes an existing automation rule by its ID.
run() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.EventListenerRunner
Continuously drains the event queue and processes each event through the Automation Hub.
run() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.communication.MessageBusClientRunner
Connects to the Message Bus server and blocks until shutdown.
run() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.CommandTimeoutWatcher
Periodically scans in-flight commands and times out any that have exceeded timeoutMs without receiving an ACK.
run() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.CoordinatorServerRunner
Binds the Netty server and blocks until CoordinatorServerRunner.shutdown() is called.
run() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.LeaderElectionRunner
Executes the Bully Algorithm: Publish ELECTION to every peer with a higher node ID. Sleep for electionTimeoutMs waiting for an OK. If no OK received → declare self leader by publishing COORDINATOR broadcast and calling ICoordinator.receiveCoordinator(String). If OK received → stand down.
run() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.gateway.LeaderPollerRunner
Polls coordinator nodes in round-robin order until a leader is found or stop() is called.
run() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.heartbeats.HeartbeatMonitor
Main monitoring loop.
run() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.heartbeats.HeartbeatSender
Enters a loop that publishes one heartbeat message per interval until stopped.
run() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageBusServerRunner
Binds the Netty server to the configured port and blocks until shutdown.
run() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageDispatcherRunner
Continuously takes messages from the inbound queue and fans them out to all subscribers of the message's topic.

S

sendCommand(Command) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.gateway.ApiGateway
Sends a command to a specific device.

Emits a heartbeat message to the HEARTBEAT topic on the message bus.
sendHeartbeat() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.InputDevice
Emits a heartbeat message to the HEARTBEAT topic on the message bus.
sendHeartbeat() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.SmartLight
Emits a heartbeat message to the HEARTBEAT topic on the message bus.
sendHeartbeat() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.SmartSpeaker
Emits a heartbeat message to the HEARTBEAT topic on the message bus.
sendMessage(String) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.communication.MessageBusClientRunner
Writes a serialised JSON message string to the Message Bus server channel.
serialize(Message<T>) - Static method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.util.MessageSerializer
Serializes a Message of any payload type to a JSON string.

Enables or disables this automation rule.
setOnline(boolean) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.Device
Sets the online status of this device.
setRuleActive(String, boolean) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.AutomationHub
Enables or disables an existing rule without removing it.
setRuleActive(String, boolean) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.IAutomationHub
Enables or disables an existing rule without removing it.
setStatus(CommandStatus) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.models.Command
Updates the execution status of this command.
shutdown() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.communication.MessageBusClientRunner
Gracefully closes the channel and shuts down the Netty worker group.
shutdown() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.CoordinatorServerRunner
Gracefully shuts down the coordinator's Netty server.
shutdown() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageBusServerRunner
Gracefully shuts down the Netty server, releasing all thread groups and closing all accepted channels.
SmartLight - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.device
Represents a smart light edge device.
SmartLight(String, String) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.SmartLight
Constructs a SmartLight.
SmartSpeaker - Class in edu.yu.cs.com3810.device
Represents a smart speaker edge device.
SmartSpeaker(String, String) - Constructor for class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.SmartSpeaker
Constructs a SmartSpeaker with a default volume of 50 and paused state.
SPEAKER - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.DeviceType
A smart speaker that can play/pause, skip, rewind, and adjust volume.
SPEAKER_PAUSE - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.DeviceAction
Pause playback.
SPEAKER_PLAY - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.DeviceAction
Start or resume playback.
SPEAKER_REWIND - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.DeviceAction
Rewind to the previous track.
SPEAKER_SET_VOLUME - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.DeviceAction
Set the speaker volume to a specific level.
SPEAKER_SKIP - Enum constant in enum class edu.yu.cs.com3810.enums.DeviceAction
Skip to the next track.
start() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.AutomationHub
Starts the Automation Hub: registers with the message bus and subscribes to the EVENT topic to begin receiving input device events.
start() - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.IAutomationHub
Starts the Automation Hub: registers with the message bus and subscribes to the EVENT topic to begin receiving input device events.
start() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Starts this coordinator node: registers with the message bus, subscribes to relevant topics (REGISTER, HEARTBEAT, COMMAND results), and initiates the leader election process.
start() - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.ICoordinator
Starts this coordinator node: registers with the message bus, subscribes to relevant topics (REGISTER, HEARTBEAT, COMMAND results), and initiates the leader election process.
start() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.gateway.ApiGateway
Starts the API Gateway by polling the coordinator cluster until a leader is elected and identified.
start(IMessageBus) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.IEdgeDevice
Starts the device: registers with the message bus, publishes a RegistrationPayload to the REGISTER topic, subscribes to the COMMAND topic to receive commands, and begins emitting heartbeats on the HEARTBEAT topic.
start(IMessageBus) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.InputDevice
Starts the device: registers with the message bus, publishes a RegistrationPayload to the REGISTER topic, subscribes to the COMMAND topic to receive commands, and begins emitting heartbeats on the HEARTBEAT topic.
start(IMessageBus) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.SmartLight
Starts the device: registers with the message bus, publishes a RegistrationPayload to the REGISTER topic, subscribes to the COMMAND topic to receive commands, and begins emitting heartbeats on the HEARTBEAT topic.
start(IMessageBus) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.SmartSpeaker
Starts the device: registers with the message bus, publishes a RegistrationPayload to the REGISTER topic, subscribes to the COMMAND topic to receive commands, and begins emitting heartbeats on the HEARTBEAT topic.
startElection() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Starts a new leader election by launching a LeaderElectionRunner in a dedicated thread.
startElection() - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.ICoordinator
Starts a new leader election by launching a LeaderElectionRunner in a dedicated thread.
stop() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.AutomationHub
Stops the Automation Hub and unsubscribes from all message bus topics.
stop() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.EventListenerRunner
Stops the event drain loop.
stop() - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.IAutomationHub
Stops the Automation Hub and unsubscribes from all message bus topics.
stop() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.CommandTimeoutWatcher
Stops the watcher loop.
stop() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.Coordinator
Gracefully shuts down this coordinator node.
stop() - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.coordinator.ICoordinator
Gracefully shuts down this coordinator node.
stop() - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.IEdgeDevice
Gracefully shuts down the device, unsubscribing from the message bus and stopping heartbeat emission.
stop() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.InputDevice
Gracefully shuts down the device, unsubscribing from the message bus and stopping heartbeat emission.
stop() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.SmartLight
Gracefully shuts down the device, unsubscribing from the message bus and stopping heartbeat emission.
stop() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.device.SmartSpeaker
Gracefully shuts down the device, unsubscribing from the message bus and stopping heartbeat emission.
stop() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.gateway.ApiGateway
Gracefully shuts down the API Gateway.
stop() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.gateway.LeaderPollerRunner
Stops the polling loop.
stop() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.heartbeats.HeartbeatMonitor
Stops the monitoring loop.
stop() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.heartbeats.HeartbeatSender
Signals the heartbeat loop to stop after its current sleep elapses.
stop() - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageDispatcherRunner
Stops the dispatch loop.
subscribe(String, TopicType) - Method in class edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.MessageBus
Subscribes a node to a topic.
subscribe(String, TopicType, Consumer<Message<?>>) - Method in interface edu.yu.cs.com3810.messagebus.IMessageBus
Subscribes a component to a topic so that it receives all messages published to that topic.

Builds a SUBSCRIBE control frame JSON string.
